style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from bulbasaur's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel plates. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its seam lines, accompanied by metallic dust particles swirling in slow, precise orbits. A cool, sharp blue-white aura emanates from its body, casting sharp, geometric shadows. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
